chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 122 of 2024 SCRA 123 of 2024 SCRA 124 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.542/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 26.03.2026 Mr. Muhammad Siddique, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2024 without any progress. On 09.08.2024, following order was passed: “09.08.2024 Mr. Muhammad Siddiq, Advocate for Applicant. Counsel for the Applicant is not fully prepared. Adjourned. Office shall place copy of this order in connected files.” Today once again counsel seeks time for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
